tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Here is Maroon 5's "ANIMALS" from their new album.  
Tabbed by: KGBAK

Chords:

[ch]Em[/ch]: X7X08X
[ch]D[/ch]: X5X07X
[ch]C[/ch]: X3X05X
[ch]D/G[/ch]: 3X007X



[Intro chorus 1]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                
Baby I'm preying on you tonight [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]      
Hunt you down eat you alive[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Just like animals, Animals[/tab]

Like animals

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Maybe you think that you can hide[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/G[/ch]       
I can smell your scent for miles[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch] 
Just like animals, Animals[/tab]

Like animals, Baby I'm


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       
So what you trying to do to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
It's like we can't stop we're enemies[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
But we get along when I'm inside you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
You're like a drug that's killing me[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/G[/ch]
I cut you out entirely[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
But I get so high when I'm inside you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah you can start over you can run free[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
You can find other fish in the sea[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
You can pretend it's meant to be[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
But you can't stay away from me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
I can still hear you making that sound[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D/G[/ch]
Taking me down rolling on the ground[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
You can pretend that it was me, But no[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                
Baby I'm preying on you tonight [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]      
Hunt you down eat you alive[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Just like animals, Animals[/tab]

Like animals

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]
Maybe you think that you can hide[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/G[/ch]       
I can smell your scent for miles[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch] 
Just like animals, Animals[/tab]

Like animals, Baby I'm


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
So if I run it's not enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
You're still in my head forever stuck[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
So you can do what you wanna do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I love your lies I'll eat 'em up[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/G[/ch]
But don't deny the animal[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
That comes alive when I'm inside you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah you can start over you can run free[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
You can find other fish in the sea[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
You can pretend it's meant to be[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
But you can't stay away from me[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
I can still hear you making that sound[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D/G[/ch]
Taking me down rolling on the ground[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
You can pretend that it was me, But no[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                
Baby I'm preying on you tonight [/tab]

Hunt you down eat you alive[/tab]

Like animals

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]D/G[/ch]       
I can smell your scent for miles[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch] 
Just like animals, Animals[/tab]

Like animals, Baby I'm


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Don't tell no lie, lie lie lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
You can't deny, ny ny ny[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
The beast inside, side side side[/tab]
Yeah yeah yeah

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
No girl don't lie, lie lie lie[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/G[/ch]
You can't deny, ny ny ny[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
The beast inside, side side side[/tab]
Yeah yeah yeah

Woahh...
Woahh...

Animals
Like animals

Like animals (yeahh...)
